name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virus Detected
notes: This Building Block defines virus detection events.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virus Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Malware.Backdoor Detected, Malware.Hostile Mail Attachment, Malware.Hostile Software Download, Malware.Malicious Software, Malware.Misc Malware, Malware.Spyware Detected, Malware.Trojan Detected, Malware.Unknown Malware, Malware.Virus Detected
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Virus Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Malware.Backdoor Detected, Malware.Hostile Mail Attachment, Malware.Hostile Software Download, Malware.Malicious Software, Malware.Misc Malware, Malware.Spyware Detected, Malware.Trojan Detected, Malware.Unknown Malware, Malware.Virus Detected
